creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-11-23 22:35:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/wire             Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Wired is an open, modern and free version of the BBS-style
  client/server system, providing chat, messaging and file
  transfers.
  
  Wire is a screen-oriented command line Wired client.
  It supports most Wired features, including file transfers.
  
  WWW:    http://www.zankasoftware.com/wired/wire/
  
  PR:             ports/105797
  Submitted by:   trasz <trasz at pin.if.uz.zgora.pl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1764    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/net/wire/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/wire/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net/wire/pkg-descr (new)
